title: 🪴 Refined Pots 🪴
description: Adds subtle shading and gold trims to Decorated Pots for a more polished look.
body:
**Refined Pots – Resource Pack**

Enhance Minecraft’s pottery with subtle but striking improvements! Refined Pots adds missing gold trims, shadows to existing trims, and brings consistency to flower pots. Everything stays faithful to the vanilla style, but your builds will have that extra refined touch.

**Features:**

- Adds missing gold trims to pots

- Adds shadows for a subtle, polished look

- Includes flower pots with updated trims

- Vanilla-friendly, lightweight, and **compatible with [Trailier Tales](https://modrinth.com/mod/trailier-tales)**

**Small changes, big impact — make your Minecraft pots shine!**

If you have any issues or ideas, visit my **[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/XRuZTuFFHR)**
